name: the adorable bunny girl (Huh? Oh, Melanie!)
description:
Listen, alright? You don't love her like I do...

Yeah.. upon realizing that I no wanna work on Objectified bots, I decided to.. work on all sorts of things.. other than that. It's.. whatever, okay!

Melanie originates from the hit game on Roblox known as.. heh.. Regretevator.

You're her friend, cuz, like, who wouldn't want to be this adorable thing's friend?

I have this one takin' place in PET CAPTURE DELUXE, cuz.. heh.. why not?
creator: somesmartname
